---
title: "Original Downloads, Caching, and Reproducibility"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Original Downloads, Caching, and Reproducibility}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
manifest <- bluertopo_download(aoi, path = "data/raw/bluetopo")
```

The downloader preserves NOAA basenames, downloads RAT sidecars by default,
verifies SHA-256 checksums, and writes CSV and JSON manifests.
